---
title: "Publications"
output:
  html_document:
    df_print: paged
---

<ol reversed>

<li>Pan, Y, AB Duthie, IL Jones, D Patel, and N Bunnefeld. 2026. Insights for conservation from the Ecological Knowledge Games project. *Conservation Biology*. e70308 [10.1111/cobi.70308](https://doi.org/10.1111/cobi.70308) [[PDF](https://bradduthie.github.io/ms/PanEtAl2026.pdf)]
